description_en: The five pseudo-fawasil in سورة المائدة are serialized inside one running sentence rather than as a neatly itemized list.
impact_en: The five-item extraction is reliable, but it requires editorial splitting of the serialized phrasing.

description_en: The local ruʾūs witness preserves the opening extra head “بالعقود”, then resumes only at “مبين / ١٥ مستقيم ...”. The whole early block through “يصنعون” is absent.
impact_en: Ordinals 2–15 must be reconstructed explicitly rather than treated as present in the witness.

description_en: The disputed non-Kufi head “ويعفو عن كثير”, stated in the entry itself, is absent from the surviving ruʾūs page between “يصنعون” and “مبين”.
impact_en: The normalized later-Madani sequence must restore this head explicitly at ordinal 16.

description_en: At the point where the witness resumes, “مبين” survives without its expected display numeral, after which the page continues “١٥ مستقيم، ١٦ قدير ...”.
impact_en: The surviving witness must be treated as resuming mid-display layer rather than as a clean start of sequence.

description_en: The checked parallel PDF witness compresses several adjacent lines across page boundaries, including “٤٤ الظالمون٤٥ للمتقين”, “٧٧ يعتدون٧٨ يفعلون”, and “١١٠ مسلمون١١١ مؤمنين”.
impact_en: The ordered list remains recoverable, but those boundary joins should not be re-imported as single heads.

description_en: After the final surviving head “قدير”, the witness carries a standalone blank “١٢٠” line.
impact_en: This terminal line functions as a display total and must not be treated as an additional head.

description_en: The surviving display numerals are not a second normalized ordinal layer. They reflect the printed witness’s own running display scheme, while extra disputed heads appear without numerals.
impact_en: The dataset preserves the ordered later-Madani sequence 1–122 rather than reproducing the defective witness numbering as a primary key.
